Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution
Off Calendar Oct-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jessica Alexandra, Certified Legal Intern and Ora Prochovnick, Supervising Attorney of NEW COLLEGE HOUSING ADVOCACY CLINIC 982-1300, for defendant Yury Gogolicyn, moving to set aside and vacate default judgment and recall writ of execution
John P. Baba, Esq. of WIEGEL & FRIED 552-8230, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
* The following witnesses were sworn and examined per Court's tentative ruling:
Harold Danley, plaintiff's process server, was sworn and examined.
Defendant Yury Gogolicyn was sworn and examined.
** The Court, having heard the testimony, took DEFENDANT YURY GOGOLICYN'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution under submission. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION To Quash Service Of Summons Or Stay Or Dismiss,
Off Calendar Sep-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Yury Gogolicyn appearing in propria persona 864-6313, moving to quash service of summons

RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT YURY GOGOLICYN'S MOTION To Quash Service Of Summons Or Stay Or Dismiss -- OFF CALENDAR, default entered on 9/23/03. (301/JLW) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
